name: TridentSynth Query Builder
description: Validate and prepare a TridentSynth synthesis query for a target molecule. Mirrors the public TridentSynth form fields: target SMILES, PKS/Bio/Chem strategy selection, optional Bio/Chem step limits, PKS release mechanism, PKS starter/extender substrates, and optional DORAnet C/N/O atom filters.

inputs.name: target_smiles
inputs.description: Single target-molecule SMILES string for TridentSynth. Should represent one molecule only.

inputs.name: use_pks
inputs.description: Whether to include the PKS synthesis strategy. Defaults to true.

inputs.name: use_bio
inputs.description: Whether to include the Bio synthesis strategy. Defaults to false.

inputs.name: use_chem
inputs.description: Whether to include the Chem synthesis strategy. Defaults to false.

inputs.name: max_bio_steps
inputs.description: Maximum biological synthesis steps. Allowed values: 1, 2, or 3.

inputs.name: max_chem_steps
inputs.description: Maximum chemical synthesis steps. Allowed values: 1, 2, or 3.

inputs.name: pks_release_mechanism
inputs.description: PKS release mechanism. Allowed values: 'thiolysis' or 'cyclization'.

inputs.name: pks_starters
inputs.description: List of PKS starter substrates. Allowed values: Malonyl-CoA, Methylmalonyl-CoA, Allylmalonyl-CoA, Methoxymalonyl-CoA, Hydroxymalonyl-CoA.

inputs.name: pks_extenders
inputs.description: List of PKS extender substrates. Allowed values: Malonyl-CoA, Methylmalonyl-CoA, Ethylmalonyl-CoA, Methoxymalonyl-CoA, Allylmalonyl-CoA.

inputs.name: max_carbon
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet maximum carbon atom filter for intermediates.

inputs.name: max_nitrogen
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet maximum nitrogen atom filter for intermediates.

inputs.name: max_oxygen
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet maximum oxygen atom filter for intermediates.

inputs.name: auto_optimize_unspecified
inputs.description: If true, auto-fill omitted optional settings with a compact exploratory configuration. Defaults to true.

outputs.description: JSON-serializable query summary containing the normalized TridentSynth parameters, inferred strategy label, any auto-filled defaults, warnings, and the public submission URL.
